 The good

here's how i find $10k/month niches in 20 minutes:

go to reddit

find a subreddit with 50k+ members

sort by top posts this month

read the top 10 complaints

if 3+ complaints are about the same problem — that's your niche

Things you should do before using GLP agonists 

1. Lift weights 2-3 days per week (tracking strength on key lifts)

2. 8-10k steps daily 

3. Plenty of lean protein 

4. Consistent meal timing 

5. Remove mindless snacking 

6. Emphasize satiating foods/meals

7. No exteme diet.

Osteoarthritis & back pain affects millions of people. Instead of managing symptoms, imagine rebuilding joints by making them young

New study shows the reprogramming gene combo OSK regrows joints in mice & effect depends on TET2 so it's epigenetic...

For decades, aging was studied mainly through metabolism, damage accumulation, or genetics. Increasingly, the field is exploring whether loss of epigenetic information may be a major driver of aging across tissues

If that hypothesis continues to hold up, studies like this may represent an early stage in a new era of medicine: treating age-related diseases by restoring youth, rather than replacing tissues after they fail
